节点.描述: 模块头结点，源自 @kit 注释

节点.功能描述: Provides WebSocket APIs.
Creates a web socket connection.
注释信息: @returns { WebSocket } the WebSocket of the createWebSocket.

节点.功能描述: Defines the optional parameters carried in the request for establishing a WebSocket connection.
HTTP request header.
File path for client cert.
Wheter or not to skip the verification of the server's certification.
Client cert.
HTTP proxy configuration. Use 'system' if this filed is not set.
Self defined protocol.
Self defined interval of ping frame. default: 30. disable: 0. max: 30000. unit:second. Ping is performed at every pingInterval.

Self defined timeout of pong frame. default: 30. max: 30000. unit:second. The value must be less than or equal to pingInterval. If no pong is received with the pongTimeout period, the websocket connection will be disconnected.
HTTP proxy configuration. system: means that use system proxy configuration. no-proxy: means do not use proxy. object of @type {connection.HttpProxy} means providing custom proxy settings

The clientCert field of the client certificate, which includes three attributes: client certificate (certPath) and only support PEM format, certificate private key (keyPath), and passphrase (keyPassword).
The path to the client certificate file.
The path of the client certificate private key file.
Client certificate password.
Defines the optional parameters carried in the request for closing a WebSocket connection.
Error code.
Error cause.
The result for closing a WebSocket connection.
Error code.
Error cause.
HTTP response headers.
Defines a WebSocket object. Before invoking WebSocket APIs, you need to call webSocket.createWebSocket to create a WebSocket object.
Initiates a WebSocket request to establish a WebSocket connection to a given URL.
注释信息: @param { string } url URL for establishing a WebSocket connection.
@param { AsyncCallback<boolean> } callback - the callback of connect.
@throws { BusinessError } 2302002 - Websocket certificate file does not exist.
@throws { BusinessError } 2302998 - It is not allowed to access this domain.

parameters.说明: URL for establishing a WebSocket connection.
the callback of connect.

error_codes.description: Websocket certificate file does not exist.
It is not allowed to access this domain.

节点.功能描述: Sends data through a WebSocket connection.

@param { AsyncCallback<boolean> } callback - the callback of send.

parameters.说明: Data to send. It can be a string(API 6) or an ArrayBuffer(API 8).
the callback of send.

节点.功能描述: Enables listening for the open events of a WebSocket connection.

parameters.说明: event indicating that a WebSocket connection has been opened.
the callback used to return the result.

the callback used to return the result.

parameters.说明: event indicating that a message has been received from the server.
the callback used to return the result.

节点.功能描述: Creates a web socket Server.
Defines parameters for a WebSocket Server.
Network card that the server listens on. The server listens on this specific address. It's 0.0.0.0 by default.
Port number that the server listens on.
Server cert.
Maximum number of concurrent clients. When it's reached, the server will reject new connections.
Self defined protocol.
Maximum number of one client's connections. When it's reached, the server will reject new connections.
The serverCert field of the server certificate, which includes two attributes: File paths of server certificate (certPath) and certificate private key (keyPath). Only support PEM format.
File path for the server cert.
The path of the server certificate private key file.
Info about the connection from each specific client.
IP address of the client.
Port of the client.
Info about the message received from a specific client.
Contend of the message.
The connection where the message comes from.
Callback function when a client connection is closed.
注释信息: @param { WebSocketConnection } clientConnection - the connection which is closed.
@param { CloseResult } closeReason - the error code and reason why the connection is closed.

节点.功能描述: Defines a WebSocketServer object. Before invoking WebSocketServer APIs, you need to call webSocketServer.createWebSocketServer to create a WebSocket Server.
Start the WebSocket Server, and listen to a given port.
注释信息: @param { WebSocketServerConfig } config - setting for the server, such as ip address and port to listen to.
@returns { Promise<boolean> } Indicating whether the server starts sucessfully.
@throws { BusinessError } 2302002 - Websocket certificate file does not exist.
@throws { BusinessError } 2302004 - Can't listen on the given NIC.
@throws { BusinessError } 2302005 - Can't listen on the given Port.

parameters.说明: setting for the server, such as ip address and port to listen to.

节点.return_description: Indicating whether the server starts sucessfully.

error_codes.description: Websocket certificate file does not exist.
Can't listen on the given NIC.
Can't listen on the given Port.

节点.功能描述: List all alive connections.
注释信息: @returns { WebSocketConnection[] } an array consists connections from all clients.
节点.return_description: an array consists connections from all clients.

节点.功能描述: Close a given WebSocket connection.
注释信息: @param { WebSocketConnection } connection - which on to be closed.
@returns { Promise<boolean> } Indicating whether the connection is closed sucessfully.
@throws { BusinessError } 2302006 - websocket connection does not exist.

parameters.说明: which on to be closed.
Optional parameters {@link WebSocketCloseOptions}.

节点.return_description: Indicating whether the connection is closed sucessfully.

节点.功能描述: Send a message using a specific connection.
注释信息: @param { string | ArrayBuffer } data - What to send. It can be a string or an ArrayBuffer.
@returns { Promise<boolean> } Indicating whether the message is sent sucessfully.
@throws { BusinessError } 2302006 - websocket connection does not exist.

parameters.说明: What to send. It can be a string or an ArrayBuffer.
Where to sent.

节点.return_description: Indicating whether the message is sent sucessfully.

节点.功能描述: Stop listening.
注释信息: @returns { Promise<boolean> } The Indicating whether the server stops sucessfully.
节点.return_description: The Indicating whether the server stops sucessfully.
